title: Tarn (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tarn''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Tarn]]''', homeworld of the [[Tarnab]] species

==Legends==
*'''[[Tarn (Khoonda)|Tarn]]''', a mechanic who resided at [[Khoonda]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the [[First Jedi Purge]].
*'''[[Tarn (Rebellion)|Tarn]]''', a child of a crew member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] star cruiser ''[[Republic's Return]]''
*'''[[Rhad Tarn]]'''
*'''[[Eremin Tarn]]'''

{{Disambig}}
